title: SomeThings
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3b255c46bfc87d691e7c35b0bc8faffac28776d.jpeg)

SomeThings mod introduces some unique artifacts: the Astral Shield, the Scroll of the Ocean, Wind Boots, the Luminous Arm Guard, and others. Each artifact brings special abilities and effects.

### For now there are **6** artifacts:
![Artifacts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05f784abdea9358f6464f5caa6080c0431150ef5.png)
- _Wind Boots_: Gives Speed II
  
- _Astral Shield_: Gives you Protection II when in Main Hand, spawns a protective sphere around you when in Off-Hand (Right-Click to be launched into the air (Useful for running away from monsters))
  
- _Luminous Arm Guard_: Illuminates the surrounding area (Right-Click for On/Off).
  
- _Ocean Scroll_: Gives you Haste II and the capacity to breathe underwater.
  
- _Evocator_: Allows you to spawn a zombie minion every 60 seconds for 30 seconds.

- _Angel Feather_: This feather grants the bearer ability to fly.

### Ores
- _Luminite Ore_ (The textures are very bad, I have to redo them)

### Tools and Weapons
![Luminite Set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e742f053bbec458c836108ebeab22423184d6eb.png)
- _The Luminite Tools_
  - Luminite Sword
  - Luminite Axe
  - Luminite Pickaxe
  - Luminite Hoe
  
- _Luminite Armor Set_ 



(I don't have ideas, if you have contact me via discord (```__hydr4__``` or ```ilbrojohnny```))

I changed my pc, so I lost the mod's source code. I'm working on rewriting it completely with new textures and possibly new features as well. :D (and support for multiple versions) (Nah I'm not working on it :P)
